fiber optic.definition: Fiber optic hi data transmission sathi vaprli janari glass kiwa plastic cable aahe.

otdr.definition: OTDR mhanje Optical Time Domain Reflectometer.
otdr.use: Fiber cable madhil fault ani distance shodhnyasathi vapartat.

edfa.definition: EDFA mhanje Erbium Doped Fiber Amplifier.
